sources.name: PubChem

structuredAccess.accessNotes: Useful for chemical identifiers and metadata; not clinical authority.

limitations: Does not establish clinical efficacy, dosing, contraindications, monitoring, or regulatory truth.

sources.name: PubMed

structuredAccess.accessNotes: Bibliographic index; evidence quality must be evaluated at source level.

limitations: Index presence is not evidence quality; individual papers require extraction and grading.

sources.name: ClinicalTrials.gov

structuredAccess.accessNotes: Useful for trial status and endpoints; results availability varies.

limitations: Trial registration does not prove efficacy or safety; posted results require separate review.

sources.name: DailyMed

structuredAccess.accessNotes: Authoritative US labeling source for approved products.

limitations: Product-specific; does not validate compounded or research-product claims.

sources.name: U.S. Food and Drug Administration

structuredAccess.accessNotes: Use specific FDA label, approval, enforcement, or warning pages as source snapshots.

limitations: Source snapshot must identify the specific FDA page, label, or communication.

sources.name: NIH Office of Dietary Supplements Fact Sheets
sources.publisher: National Institutes of Health Office of Dietary Supplements

structuredAccess.accessNotes: Useful consumer/professional summary source; cite individual fact sheet pages.

limitations: Not a product label; safety-critical or dosing claims should be corroborated when used for canonical fields.

sources.name: NIH National Center for Complementary and Integrative Health

structuredAccess.accessNotes: Useful for consumer-readable evidence summaries and safety caveats.

limitations: Not a substitute for labels or clinical guidelines for safety-critical fields.

sources.name: International Society of Sports Nutrition Position Stands
sources.publisher: International Society of Sports Nutrition / Journal of the International Society of Sports Nutrition

structuredAccess.accessNotes: Use individual position stand articles with DOI/PMID when available.

limitations: Position stands synthesize evidence but are not regulator labels or individualized clinical guidance.

sources.name: DrugBank
limitations: Check licensing; not a sole authority for dosing or safety-critical publication fields.

sources.name: Peer-reviewed human or biomedical paper

structuredAccess.accessNotes: Use DOI/PMID and paper-level quality grading. This family covers curated source snapshots from journals such as NEJM, JAMA, Lancet, Cortex, or PubMed-indexed trials.

limitations: Does not establish approved indications, product-specific dosing, contraindications, regulator status, or broad consumer claims without additional authoritative support.

sources.name: Peer-reviewed review article

structuredAccess.accessNotes: Use DOI/PMID where available and keep review conclusions separate from primary trial results.

limitations: Not a regulator label; should not establish safety-critical or approved-use fields without A1/A2 corroboration.

sources.name: World Anti-Doping Agency Prohibited List

structuredAccess.accessNotes: Use the current prohibited list and verify year/version before publication.

limitations: Sports anti-doping authority only; not a general medical regulator or clinical safety authority.

sources.name: Community and social-source monitoring

structuredAccess.accessNotes: Use only for discovering claims users may encounter; do not treat as factual authority.

limitations: Never establishes dosing, safety, efficacy, regulatory status, contraindications, warnings, or compatibility.
